conversation_memory.content: Hello there, it's great to hear from you. How are you doing today? It's completely okay to just say hello and not have anything specific on your mind. If you're feeling up to it, we can start with something simple. We don't have any new tasks to work on right now, and your wellness dashboard is looking good. Would you like to talk about what's been going on or see if there's anything you'd like to add to your tasks?
